source: CaseBrain H5 presentation builders (no Brain 1 mutation)

matterConfidence.label: Needs review before relying
matterConfidence.doNotRelyYetReason: Human review or material gaps flagged on current papers.

evidenceStates.label: CCTV full window / master footage
evidenceStates.evidenceAnchor: Officers attended following a call. There was contact between the defendant and officers. Body-worn video is referred to on the schedule but not attached. Custody record is extract only.

doNotOverstate: Do not import drugs continuity unless the papers support it.
Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Do not import phone extraction/metadata unless the papers support it.
Assumed position may conflict with interview or served evidence.
Do not state "CCTV confirms" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
Do not state "CCTV proves" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
Do not state "Full CCTV confirms" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
hardRules: Referred only does not mean usable.
Inference must be labelled as inference.
No line is sendable just because a source exists.

chaseItems.label: CCTV full window / master footage
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide cCTV full window / master footage or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy. Evidence state: referred only. Source: MG6/MG6C disclosure schedule. Solicitor review required before sending.]

courtNote.text:
The defence asks the court to record that full custody and interview records remain outstanding.

[CaseBrain — court line copy. Evidence state: needs review. Confirm before addressing the court.]

exportVersion.reviewFooter: Solicitor review required before sending to CPS, court, or client.
